## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategy for responding to Him's questionnaire and proposal, and explore approaches for programmatic SEO and content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to hire technical talent (2 product engineers, 2 backend) to build a robust platform for programmatic SEO and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Developing a custom solution with shared codebase for different clients (e.g., Him, Agent, PJ) is crucial for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Emphasis on building efficient workflows, integrating various APIs, and balancing automation with human-in-the-loop processes](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Topics

### Hiring and Team Expansion

  - [66 qualified AI/tech candidates and 60 backend candidates identified](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Plan to hire 4 people: 2 product engineers and 2 backend developers](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Focus on finding full-stack mindset for programmatic SEO projects](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### Programmatic SEO Platform Development

  - [Need to build a custom platform similar to Deep Grammar project](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Utilize shared codebase for different clients with customizable UI/flows](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Integrate features like plagiarism check, image generation, and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Develop browser extensions for efficient data collection and processing](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

### Content Quality and Research

  - [Implement information gain assessment and plagiarism checks](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Integrate with medical research databases (e.g., PubMed, Google Scholar)](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Develop custom workflows for source validation and content extraction](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Balance automation with human review for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)

### Client-Specific Considerations (Him)

  - [Potential project scope: 10,000 pages of content](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Need to integrate with drug databases and medical research sources](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Custom workflows required for quality assessment and information gain](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)

### Fundraising and Pitch Strategy

  - [Create a concise (4-5 minute) video explaining the power of the platform](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Highlight the ability to move faster and adapt to client needs](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Emphasize the customizable nature of the solution without revealing too much proprietary information](https://fathom.video/share/ejSfrjCEdtse6awVxsi1wHdzcsxx7gwM?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
